overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a desert highway toward the neon-lit Night City skyline at dusk. The camera moves steadily past distinctive landmarks including a massive flaming hand billboard, transmission towers, and artistic windmills while various vehicles pass by on the wet reflective asphalt.

events.description: black SUV passes by on the left side of the highway
large flaming hand billboard becomes visible on the left side of the road
black pickup truck passes from right to left in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert highway toward the distant illuminated city skyline

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in the same direction on the left side of the road
black pickup truck passing quickly in the opposite direction

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with illuminated towers and neon signs visible in the distance
tall metal lattice towers with multiple power lines spanning across the highway
red and white striped concrete barriers along the left side of the road
massive sculptural billboard featuring a hand holding flames, an iconic landmark

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway at dusk with the neon-lit Night City skyline visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past red and white guardrails while a black SUV drives alongside. A massive flaming hand billboard emerges on the left, becoming a dominant feature as various vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with mountain views and artistic windmills

events.description: camera pans left to reveal more of the desert mountain range and landscape
yellow truck and silver car pass by in opposite directions
green sports car passes by quickly on the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while panning left to view the desert landscape and rocky mountains

notable_agents.action: yellow truck driving along the left side of the highway
green sports car passing at high speed

entered.detail: artistic metallic windmill structures with multiple blades lining the right side of the road
rocky desert hills and mountains with sparse vegetation and warm sunset lighting

segments.scene_description: Having passed the flaming billboard, the camera pans left to showcase the expansive desert mountain range. Artistic windmill sculptures line the right side of the road while various vehicles including a yellow truck and green sports car pass by. The city skyline shifts to the right as the focus moves to the natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with power lines and approaching billboards

events.description: blue modified truck with yellow wheels passes by in the opposite direction
road sign enters the frame from the left side
black van passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: driving along the highway with the city skyline gradually returning to center view

notable_agents.action: blue customized truck with large yellow wheels and white tribal decals
black van traveling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: back of a rectangular road sign mounted on a metal pole
large empty billboard frame with blank white surface facing the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the highway corridor lined with transmission towers and artistic windmills. A distinctive blue modified truck with yellow wheels passes by, followed by a black van. The city skyline gradually returns to center view while a large empty billboard and road sign enter the frame from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: final approach to city outskirts with billboards and traffic

events.description: orange sedan passes by on the left side of the road
red pickup truck passes by in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: approaching the city outskirts with increasing traffic passing by on the multi-lane highway

notable_agents.action: orange sedan driving along the left side of the highway
red pickup truck passing in the opposite lane

segments.scene_description: In the final approach to the city, the camera passes the large empty billboard which recedes into the distance. An orange sedan and red pickup truck pass by as the highway guardrails return to the foreground. The neon-lit city skyline remains prominent ahead while the desert windmills and road sign exit the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey along a desert highway at dusk, transitioning from a landscape dominated by colossal roadside advertisements to a focused approach toward the neon-lit Night City skyline. It begins by gliding past red and white guardrails and a black SUV, as a massive flaming hand billboard emerges on the left to dominate the view over the wet asphalt. As the camera pans left to reveal an expansive mountain range, the focus shifts toward artistic windmill sculptures and passing colorful vehicles, momentarily pushing the city skyline to the periphery. The scene then expands along a corridor of transmission towers and windmills, passing a blue modified truck and a black van before the city skyline gradually returns to the center of the frame. Finally, the camera passes a large empty billboard and a road sign as an orange sedan and red pickup truck streak by, leaving the desert landmarks behind to face the prominent glow of the city ahead.
